candidate_definitions.text: Terraform module, which takes care of a lot of AWS Lambda/serverless tasks (build dependencies, packages, updates, deployments) in countless combinations 🇺🇦
Terraform module, which creates almost all supported AWS Lambda resources as well as taking care of building and packaging of required Lambda dependencies for functions and layers.
Terraform module to create AWS resources for sending notifications to Slack 🇺🇦
This module creates an SNS topic (or uses an existing one) and an AWS Lambda function that sends notifications to Slack using the [incoming webhooks API](https://api.slack.com/incoming-webhooks).
